user.title: Battery SOC Sensor
user.description: Select the sensor that reports your battery's state of charge (SOC).

grid.title: Grid Connection Detection
grid.description: Select how power outages are detected. You can use a grid status sensor or voltage monitoring.

voltage.title: Voltage Monitoring Sensors
voltage.description: Select the voltage sensors for each phase. A power outage is detected when all three phases drop below 50V.

thresholds.title: Battery Thresholds
thresholds.description: Configure when tier 2 devices should be turned off and restored based on battery SOC.

notifications.title: Notification Services
notifications.description: Select which notification services should receive Battery Guard alerts. Persistent notifications are always enabled.

error.recovery_must_exceed_threshold: Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold
Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold
